steps.title: Find the two clauses
steps.content: The first clause says Pessoa authored many works in the voices of fictional personas. The next clause says Ricardo Reis was among those personas. These are two complete, closely related clauses.

steps.title: Choose the clause break
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly combines a colon with “and.” Choice C uses “and” without a balanced compound structure. Choice D creates a comma splice between complete clauses. A semicolon correctly separates the two related clauses. The answer is B.
